text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan manages to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

One day, while we bask in the greatness of our
victories...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow. Everything's so sparkly. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The Umastagram Desserts Expo is certainly living
up to its name with all these cute desserts! ♪

Curren Chan has brought me with her to an
underground event at a department store.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Now then... where should we start?

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text: W-wait a second! Is that Cute Curren Chan?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! That's me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text: Eep! You're like cuteness personifi—I-I mean...

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text:
Regarding today's event, if you post on social
media while shopping, you will receive a free
snack...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, really?! I guess I'll have to take some pics,
then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Having you post about this event would
be such an honor!

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text: Is your friend an Umastagrammer too?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is my—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Well, actually... ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: This is someone super-duper dear to my heart. ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text: You don't mean... y-your...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. If you look at my posts, I think you'll
understand.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No matter where you look, they're stuffed full of
our memories together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No matter where you look, they're stuffed full of
our memories together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, my dear Big Bro? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, my dear Big Sis? ♪
